## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] Previewed on mobile (375px) if UI changed
- [ ] **Albanian language reviewed** (required for SQ affiliate/guide posts — read aloud, fix awkward phrasing)
- [ ] Internal links to 2+ existing posts (affiliate/pillar)
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` files committed

## Affiliate / guide posts (SQ)

- [ ] Read full post in Albanian before merge (native-speaker pass)
- [ ] Hero uses real screenshots OR `heroStyle: none` (not generic logo alone)
- [ ] Author shows as **Dua** with author box at bottom
